title: lastrea pinnata
intro: Lastrea pinnata, also known as the Lady Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Athyriaceae. The medicinal properties of Lastrea pinnata include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as a natural diuretic, making it useful for treating conditions such as bronchitis and kidney stones. Herbal preparations of Lastrea pinnata can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various ailments.
